data.title: Magna reports Q2 2025 financial results, ended June 30, 2025. Stock symbols: TSX: MG; NYSE: MGA.
data.description: In Aurora, Ontario, on August 1, 2025, Magna International Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company's stock trades on the TSX under the symbol MG and on the NYSE under the symbol MGA.

data.title: Amazon invests in startup Fable, dubbed 'Netflix of AI,' allowing users to create episodes from prompts or photos. New storytelling approach.
data.description: Users can create complete episodes using prompts or photos on the platform, with Amazon investing in this innovative form of storytelling.

data.title: Avast recognized as top antivirus for Windows 10 in 2025 by Software Experts for strong security features.
data.description: In August 2025, Software Experts acknowledged Avast as a leading antivirus program for Windows 10*. Avast's Premium Security and Avast Ultimate were commended for their robust security features, enhanced privacy safeguards, and intuitive utilities tailored to address users' needs. The recognition underscores Avast's excellence in providing top-notch antivirus solutions for Windows 10 users.

data.title: OYO partners with IBS Software for global digital transformation in hospitality, impacting portfolio of brands like Sunday, Belvilla, and more.
data.description: An announcement was made on August 1, 2025, in Atlanta, that OYO, a worldwide travel technology company, has joined forces with IBS Software to expedite digital transformation on a global scale. This collaboration will involve OYO and its various brands such as Sunday, Belvilla, Dancenter, Traum, Check My Guest, Motel 6, and Studio 6.

data.title: Wipfli receives strategic investment from New Mountain Capital to enhance growth and innovation in client solutions.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 1, 2025, Wipfli LLP, a prominent provider of accounting, tax, and advisory services in the middle market, disclosed their definitive agreement for a substantial minority investment from New Mountain Capital. The investment deal signifies a significant milestone in the firm's growth strategy and further establishes their position as a key player in the industry. This strategic investment is poised to bring about new opportunities and drive expansion for Wipfli LLP.

data.title: XPeng and Xiaomi, Tesla's rivals, had record July deliveries in China. Nio, Li Auto, and BYD will also report EV sales.
data.description: Competitors XPeng and Xiaomi have announced record deliveries in July in the electric vehicle market, posing a challenge to Tesla. Additionally, Nio, Li Auto, and BYD are expected to publish their sales figures in China. The escalating competition in the EV sector is evident as more players achieve significant milestones.

data.title: Tallinna Vesi held investor conference on 01 Aug 2025, discussing Q2 results led by CEO Timofejev and CFO Gröön.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, an investor conference webinar was hosted by AS Tallinna Vesi. The event featured Aleksandr Timofejev, Chairman and CEO, and Taavi Gröön, CFO, discussing the company's second-quarter performance in 2025.

data.title: Tim Draper praises SEC's Project Crypto & envisions Bitcoin-centric future with blockchain powering accounting & payroll.
data.description: Renowned venture capitalist Tim Draper discussed a Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and blockchain-centered ecosystem post the SEC's launch of "Project Crypto." Draper expressed enthusiasm for the initiative introduced by SEC Chair Paul Atkins, anticipating the realization of his vision for a Bitcoin-focused future. He mentioned his desire to establish a fund entirely in Bitcoin, invest it in Bitcoin, and have startups compensate their employees and suppliers in Bitcoin, utilizing blockchain for accounting through smart contracts. Draper visualized a future where all business aspects, such as accounting, auditing, taxes, bookkeeping, and ownership transfers, would operate on decentralized blockchain platforms. Draper's detailed insights can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Earnings reports on August 1, 2025: TELUS expected to report $0.17/share on $3.68B revenue, Exxon Mobil at $1.53/share on $81.31B revenue.
data.description: Several companies are expected to report earnings before the bell, including Brookfield Business, TELUS, Anglogold Ashanti, IES Holdings, EchoStar, CNH Industrial, Church & Dwight Co, Patria Investments, Newell Brands, Liberty Global, Kimberly-Clark, Colgate-Palmolive, Avient, Exxon Mobil, RBC Bearings, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Perella Weinberg, Piper Sandler, and nVent Electric. Key estimates include TELUS reporting earnings of $0.17 per share on revenue of $3.68 billion, Anglogold Ashanti reporting earnings of $1.30 per share on revenue of $2.32 billion, and Exxon Mobil reporting earnings of $1.53 per share on revenue of $81.31 billion. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
